title: Sequence Window: Selecting a Sequence
description:
Sequence Window: Selecting a Sequence

Sequence Window: Selecting a Sequence

Notice the drop down box ("test" is the sequence name) shown at the top of the Sequence window.  Clicking on the down arrow displays a list of all the vision sequences for this project. (Some projects have only 1 vision sequence and others have many depending upon the vision application.)  You can then click on any one of the vision sequences to select which one you want to work on.
